stemHtml: You are planning an IFR flight where a destination alternate is not possible, what is the regulatory fuel overhead the destination? You must carry...

options.a: Discretionary fuel, only if required by the commander.
options.b: No additional fuel, but you need to double the contingency fuel.
options.c: Additional fuel, and you need to apply the isolated aerodrome procedure.
options.d: No additional fuel and no contingency fuel.
